park_name: BIG4 Batemans Bay at Easts Riverside Holiday Park

reviews.review_text: This place is amazing couldn’t ask for a better place to stay for the weekend. From amazing views to chucking a rod in the water catching fish. Will be back

시드니에서 멜버른 가는 길에 하루 자기 좋은 곳입니다! 마트도 근처에 있어요! 식재료 가격도 시드니에 비해 조금은 저렴한편!

해가 지면 빠르게 어두워지지만 공동키친에서 바베큐랑 요리해서 먹기 좋습니다!
Great location for paddling.  Nice oysters down the road.

Stayed here for a couple of days with the caravan and we love it here.
A spot Right near the water.  Fantastic views.
Lovely staff. Great for walks and a very clean park.
Absolutely recommend this place.

Fantastic stay at BIG4 Batemans Bay at Easts Riverside Holiday Park. The waterfront location was beautiful and relaxing, and our condo was clean, comfortable, and well presented. The spa was a great extra and made the stay even more enjoyable. The facilities were well maintained, the park felt welcoming and family-friendly, and the overall atmosphere was peaceful and easy to enjoy. Service was excellent and everything about the stay was smooth and convenient. It was a memorable stay and we would happily recommend it to friends and family. Ngā mihi nui mō te manaaki.

Fantastic stay at BIG4 Batemans Bay at Easts Riverside Holiday Park. The waterfront location was beautiful and relaxing, and our condo was clean, comfortable, and well presented. The spa was a great extra and made the stay even more enjoyable. The facilities were well maintained, the park felt welcoming and family-friendly, and the overall atmosphere was peaceful and easy to enjoy. Service was excellent and everything about the stay was smooth and convenient. It was a memorable stay and we would happily recommend it to friends and family. Ngā mihi nui mō te manaaki

Brilliant place. I stayed for one night and will definitely be back. The staff are fantastic especially Rob, very helpful guy and welcoming. You will have a great time if you stay here, it’s right by the beach and the views are beautiful.
Very clean park would go back one day on my second lap of oz

BIG 4 Batemans Bay at Easts Riverside Holiday Park is the best caravan park on the Sapphire Coast of NSW.||Picturesque location, clean well-presented comfortable cabins, friendly and informative staff.  Quiet, fantastic location, close to town and facilities. ||We would definitely come back here and stay next time, I would recommend staying here, you won't be disappointed.

Not a bad park, no dogs which is good. But the kids need to be in check. No road sense at all. Running and riding bikes flat out in front of cars with no thought or looking. When trying to navigate our van on the way out we had them riding straight in front even up the side of us while turning a bend in the park. Come on parents teach your children some rules on road sense. Or...they will get injured. This is NOT their backyard to do as they please.

Our experience was very good.  The staff were very helpful and pleasant.  Willing to help in any way possible.  The cabin in which we stayed was very clean and comfortable.  We will stay next time we are in Batemans Bay.

Wonderful.park. Absolutely spotless and what a gem to have a dedicated staff member to guide us onto site. Friendly and friendly staff. Great facilities.and proxcimity to town centre. It was lovelty to have waters edge only metres away
Wir wurden in der Rezeption sehr nett begrüsst. Unser Platz mit dem Ensuit war sehr sauber, wie auch der Rest des Parkes. Empfehlen eir sehr gerne weiter. Danke für Ihre tolle Arbeit.

My wife and myself stayed here for 3 nights what a hidden gem this place is.if you like fishing like i do you catch them of the shore flathead,bream,trevally,whiting.dont go anywhere else come here ill be back for shore.
Loved this spot and holiday ❤️
The best service I've ever seen the houses are so clean and don't forget the lovely view I highly recommend this hotel

Close to Batemans Bay over bridge can see BB from park pretty clean park check the price when booking
Stayed on a Concrete power site worked great for our van close to Amenities and camp kitchen
Lovely sunset close to beautiful beaches
Great little camp-site.. A bit tight to park larger caravans but great position..!

The bunk bed rooms had no power point and plumbing was horrible as it would leak under cabin. Too quiet and too many unnecassary complaints. Not much to really do in the actual holiday park and a very small place.

A very nice caravan park! We stayed at a powered site with our campervan. The staff is incredibly nice. The lady at the reception as well as the groundskeeper were super friendly, helpful and kind. Amenities are clean, outdoor areas are well looked after and they also have a nice little pool and playground.

This is the 3rd time we've stayed at this park and it has never failed us. We stayed for 4 nights and I wish we could've stayed longer. |The park is super quiet and the cabins are very clean. The staff are amazing. A perfect location with just a short walk over the bridge to the shops. |3 meters from the front of our cabin we swam, we fished ( where I caught a shovel nose shark). We walked along the beach, we watched the sunrise and on the last day we watched the dolphins from our verandah. |I highly recommend this park!

Friendly and helpful office and ground staff. Amenities were clean and tidy. All campers were guided onto their site by staff. Good location on the river with a short walk over bridge to centre of town.
Wonderful park to stay in ,neat and tidy playground for the kids pool to relax in  camping or cabins ,on the river . Awesome place to stay .

I made a booking for a caravan site months ago to be with our family staying in a cabin asking specifically to be near the cabin we travel in a motorhome we didn’t get put very close to our family at all even though made booking months in advance and asking to be put with our family have a 7 year old granddaughter and she like walking to us by herself so wanted to avoid lots of roads to cross… felt we got put in a small space so that other sites would be left available for other larger vans if they got further booking so was very disappointed as we have very few opportunities to spend time with our family… also found being escort to our site by some fella and told how he would park our van very intimidating it’s our site we payed for it why can’t we park our van the way we want to if we aren’t being a problem to any of our neighbors.. overall very disappointing stay with Big 4 Bateman’s Bay won’t be back… and we aren’t big fans of big 4 over all they are very picky with their customers we find not welcoming at all☹️
Outstanding stay. Forget the rest, this is the best.

Lots of choice here, wished we had requested a powered site on the river. We were placed on the entry road open to the street ($59), low fence, neighbour had fishing rods stolen so be sure to lock up securely. Location to town was great for us with our push bikes. Batemans has extensive riding paths. All park staff were welcoming and helpful.

Great location, clean tidy park and facilities. Team are always friendly and helpful. Great value for money. Like how the team come and help you park your van on your site. Always a great place to stay when visiting The Bay.

What a lovely campsite and location! Stayed here for 2 nights in our campervan and thought both the campsite and amenities were all top notch. Great location too, close to cafes, restaurants and supermarkets across the river (just a short walk away). Bathrooms were really traditional, clean and well maintained. There was a lovely laundry room with washing machines and dryers, plus a communal washing line! Staff were all really accommodating, they changed notes for coins without fuss (for the washing machines & dryers) and were really friendly and welcoming. Would love to stay here again and would highly recommend!

It was a great place to stay. Not crowded, very comfortable site with space to move.  The staff were very efficient and quick to respond. The facilities were excellent, and up to date and very clean. It had a giant chess game, a swimming pool, a games room and table tennis. The Camp Kitchen was spacious, very clean and had everything you need in it.  Did I mention it was a great place to stay???  We will be back.

Fan bloody tastic place right on the water beautiful views very clean cabins and park friendly staff love it
Only 1 thing I didn't like..the wifi is almost non existent a real shame and so easy to fix
A nice clean caravan park but extremely tight to get around with a 20ft van.  Would not recommend

East’s Riverside at Batemans Bay is a great place to stay. The staff were very helpful with parking the van and some local tips. The amenities were always clean. It was only a short walk across the bridge into the town. We would stay here again if back this way.

Stayed here recently for 3 nights on a ensuite site.
Location was great.
Facilities were good (didn't use pool as it was cold weather). Mini golf course was a hit with the kids.
Access to beach was great from the park.

Ensuite facilities were good and new.

Staff were friendly enough.
Beautiful park with gorgeous waterfront caravan sites

We travel in a motor home and stay on powered sites. Our site was level and had artificial turf
We loved the proximity to the town as we walk or ride our bikes whenever we visit parks. Great cycle paths to enjoy the foreshore or walk.
Very clean cabins and comfortable wonderful views lovely place to stay.
Excellent caravan park with water frontage walk over the bridge into town approx 1 km. Good amenities and helpful friendly staff
Good caravan park
Small but very well equipped campground. Close to a town and many stores/facilities.
Amazing view from cabins. Well maintained cabins. Excellent fishing metres away. No WiFi. Well kept park and facilities. Friendly helpful staff.
We had broken down just north of batemans bay and had our van toed to the park, the staff were SUPER helpful and accommodating to our situation. Amenities were clean. Would recommend staying here
It was absolutely great except when my son went to play in the kids' area, he went to crawl into a play tunnel and found an old man slumped over with a needle in his arm.

What an awesome place, located on the opposite side of the bay on the Clyde River, just near the bridge that connects you to the town of Batemans Bay. It is just a 2 minute walk to the little beach on the river with fantastic views of the whole bay and a great fishing spot. Batemans Bay itself is very pleasant with great facilities and friendly people. The caravan park is a quiet, family friendly park and my family felt right at home. We had a great time.

Made a last minute booking as our planned accomodation fell through.  The staff could not have been more helpful and friendly if they tried.  Right from check-in, through to assistance parking the van and helpful hints about Batemans Bay.  I cannot recommend this place and their staff highly enough.  If I could give them 6 stars I would.

This was the most expensive caravan park we stayed at on our trip at ~$70/night. It wasn't good value as it offered nothing more than other parks that cost $20 less per night.
It was clean and functional but I certainly considered it overpriced.
Lovely park . Great location. Spotless amenities. Super friendly staff.  Thankyou.
Not what I expected. But a nice little Caravan Park
Very very clean and friendly staff

Our 1st visit to this park. So impressed we booked again.
Neat, tidy, clean, great staff. Really impressed they have a grounds person guide each guest into their space. Takes all the anxiety out of setting up. Haven't seen any other park do this.
Great coffee hut.
Right on the river, great for walks and swimming.
Will now be regulars.

Ein sehr guter Platz. Es war alles super. Die Sanitäranlagen sind sauber und gepflegt. Noch nie hatten wir so eine saubere Laundry. Das Personal ist sehr freundlich und hilfsbereit. Die Privatsphäre voll gegeben. Sehr gut macht sich der Kunstrasen, eine saubere und gute Sache, so hat man immer einen tollen Caravanplatz. Wir hatten eine gute Zeit und empfehlen den Platz zu 100 Prozent weiter.
Smaller big4 park but great location and very clean park

Excellent location across the Clyde from the Batemans Bay shops. It takes about 10 minutes to walk over the bridge to get into town. There are also courtesy buses to the local pubs and clubs. The cabins are excellent and are of varying sizes. Have stayed in a small cabin at the back near the entrance and at one with about 4m between the verandah and the water. The park has a playarea and a swimming pool. There are also various BBQ and the camp kitchen along with a coin op laundry. Have not used the amenities block but they have two on site. There is a very basic beach area at the back of the park, but it o ly takes about 10 minutes to drive to the nearest patrolled beach. The staff are friendly and the park is well maintained and clean.

Quiet park in a great spot.
Not as far out of town as you think, a nice walk.
Good for young families.

We stayed for 4 wonderful nights, beautiful park in a glorious location.
Can’t wait to return for another stay.
Will bring our adult children & grandchildren next time and make some wonderful family holiday memories.

We recently stayed here for 3nights while traveling. We stayed on one of the few waterfront sites, and it was beautiful.
Sites are gravel for the Van and concrete for your awning area. Pool was cleaned daily each morning, would get busy when park is full. Amenities were very clean and in good condition.
Great little park in a great location.

We had a wonderful 6 night stay and highly recommend the caravan sites.  They are spacious and level on concrete, and the grounds are well looked after.  On arrival, we checked in with the friendly reception staff and already someone was waiting to show us to our site and help us park.  Excellent service!  We had an ensuite which was very handy as the amenities were a little far.
The shower had the best ever water pressure!
We loved every part of the park, even the pool looks inviting, although I don't think its heated.
Beautiful views over the bay, bridge and the sunsets are stunning.  Its a short drive over the bridge to the shops.
We will be returning in the future, thanks for a great stay!
Nice park located close to town with easy walk across the bridge. Facilities are clean, dump point on site but not pet friendly. Would be happy to stay again.
Very friendly host, good size sites and clean facilities. Right on the rivers edge. Internal roads are a bit narrow especially if you have a bigger caravan.  Fair pricing, good sites. All good . Jim

Old TV too small and no channels. Long walk to shops and restaurants. The old style caravan park. Tiny freezing pool. Nearly $300 per night. If a couple the better choice is Mariners, right in town with pool.

Highly recommended this caravan park. We had beautiful views over the Clyde River, spacious cabin and peaceful environment for our family. The staff were friendly and helpful. Being on the opposite side of the river from the main town meant it was relaxing yet it was only a short walk over the bridge to town with amazing views of the Clyde River, Bay and islands. The kids enjoyed finding sea shells during low tide in the river which was metres from our cabin door. Cabin had a spa, two bathrooms, three bedrooms, washing machine, dryer, dishwasher, ironing facilities and a personal BBQ on the deck. Located in a beautiful part of the world. Perfect for a family holiday!
Very nice park,bathrooms were very clean and nice
Great place to stay. The hosts are really nice and helpful.
Nice quiet  caravan park
Very happy with  the unit
Great small sized caravan park located in the bay. Awesome people work at the park. Views of the river and town.
Should you like quiet,all amenities,come in off-season.

Just had 4 nights on a water front caravan site and couldn’t fault anything with the stay at this park.The amenities were always clean and loved the water pressure and hot hot water.The camp kitchen was spotless and the laundry was very well kept too.The staff were very polite and only to happy to assist with anything.Even to help you reverse your caravan in to your site if you wish.
Definitely recommend this park 👍

This campsite is located in a fantastic spot along the waterfront. The amenities are good and clean although the kitchen is a little basic and doesn’t have an oven. Otherwise though we had a fantastic stay and would recommend staying here definitely!

Stayed here for a 2 night getaway with my parents. They had a beautiful waterfront cabin, while we had our van. The wife of the park caretakers was lovely and friendly on arrival.  We were directed to our site were her husband met us. There had been mountains of rain so the park had been affected. The manager didn't want to grass disturbed,  it bit hard when our site was in a slight hollow with grass on entry and exit of site. My husband had to move the van twice to get it in position, disturbing a 60x60cm square of grass. The manager got very annoyed, made some comments and stormed off. He was not friendly after our initial encounter.
The park is very well kept, neat and tidy and he is very park proud 👏, but people skills needs work.
Park is out of the way. Expect to have to get in the car for everything.
Photo... corner site was ours.
Loved it.
Awesome place to stay can't wait to go again in summer this time

Overall a fine caravan park with cabins, it's very clean and seems to be fairly well run by friendly staff.

The only downside is that some of the amenities and rooms are a little run down, not unusable or anything just obvious repairs done to a budget.  A couple of examples are taps which feel loose and the giant chess set having pieces which have obviously been repaired multiple times and a bad TV wall mount being "repaired" by basically putting a shelf under it. All usable but it doesn't give a premium feel.
Perfect little spot. Kids could run around on the edge of the river while we sat back and watched the sunset.

Tired and run down amenities, pool is tiny. Limited facilities given the price in peak is almost $140 per site. You are paying the price of other Easts parks where there are many more facilities and this one has very few and are old and tired. Over busy Easter period where park was pretty much full toilets were only cleaned daily.
Perfect
Great place to stay and relax friendly staff keep up the great work
Very clean park with very helpful managers. Close spot to heaven
A Great place to stay.
We had a caravan site right on the waters edge beautiful very nice place to stay would highly recommend.

Great place, beautiful location and super clean.
Highly recommend for families.
Rooms need a few globes replaced.
Excellent location on the waters edge, clean facilities a short distance away.

Camped here for 2 nights in November 23.
Lovely surroundings, close to shops and cafes .
Lovely staff and location

Riverside Park really surprised me. Amenities have had a makeover, general van sites are level, very quiet and the location is just a 10min walk to town over the bridge. Wifi sucks but hey, it ticks all the other boxes. Will come again.
Great place to take the caravan!
Bit pricey but great staff who are only too happy to help you!

Beautiful clean camp ground with lovely views of the ocean in our roof top tent  reception ladies were so nice and got us checked in super quick! During our stay we walked north along the ocean up to the mangroves (30 mins walk away) totally recommend people visiting this untouched place

We really enjoyed our stay, location is perfect, site and ensuites are clean and the staff are absolutely wonderful. Definitely recommend for families ♡
Thank you BIG4 batemans bay. See you again soon.

We had the elevated twin cabin. We've decided to leave a day early. 100% not worth the money we paid for it. Nothing like the pictures, there is no "view" just trees. No WiFi like it says. Lounge that will fit 2 people. It's tiny. The fridge was leaking and there was a terrible smell throughout which was coming from the stained carpet or the lounge. The cabin actually rocked and was wobbly, when 1 person was in a bedroom walking or tossing in bed you could feel the cabin shaking from the lounge room. The sky light was all mouldy. The stairs and verandah are wobbly and haven't been built properly. The playgrounds definitely need an upgrade, tried the big chess but unfortunately it was spider ridden, broken pieces and just disgusting in general. Should've left and got the refund when we arrived. Definitely won't be back, waste of money.
EDIT:
Instead of taking responsibility for the disgustingness and outdated/broken fridge that needs to be repaired and everything else I have stated you lie through your teeth 🤔 all issues should be repaired and since you can't take responsibility for it we definitely will not be back and will advise everyone else we know not to go there. Putrid from the so called "owner"

Stayed for one night, didn't have a beach front site but could still see the water from where we were. Nice quiet park, for some reason they had all the caravans bunched up on one side of the park and the other side with not many people there. Sites are big enough for a caravan and car to park but feels so close to other campers. Laundry was $5 for washing machine and $5 for 90 minutes in the dryer which was a great price we thought.

We had a great stay. Friendly office staff. Very clean spacious cabin with an amazing view. Comfy beds and lounge and dining table. Kitchen utensils laid out perfectly! Gave me ideas for home! Special thanks to Rob for cleaning our bbq spotless each morning! Great staff, great park!!

Booked accommodation at this park to celebrate ours sons 9th birthday.
Location of our cabin was amazing with stunning views. The cabin had absolutely everything we needed and more. It was clean and comfortable and all staff were very friendly and welcoming including Rob from maintenance who stood out to us
with his efforts keeping the park clean and tidy for guests to enjoy.
Excellent location, great facilities

I had an awesome time here! Hands down the cleanest I've ever seen for holiday park accommodation! Super good views....very comfortable spa condo! The spa was amazing! Staff nice and friendly! You can walk straight out the front door and cast your rod! Managed to catch a few little tailor under the bridge! I'll definitely be back when they've grown a little bigger! To all the shame jobs that have put 1 star....I'm kinda glad you won't be back!😆🙌🙏

Park looked great, only stayed the night.
Both Toilets were locked close to our site
And the main toilet near the front gate wasn't secure, so didn't feel very safe if you had to go at 3am on your own.

Beautiful setting, spotlessly  clean,  kitchen well set up, plenty of everything. A bonus BIG bath towels love them ❤️ Staff are wonderful and if we needed anything done they followed up promptly The only minor criticism I have is the Internet. Totally nit up to my expectations...would be happy to pay a " premium internet service" Overall totally recommend this place ❤️
Considering it is winter we have over our two week stay had sunshine everyday and rain for only 20 minutes. Caravan site and facilities clean and well serviced.
A beautiful spot walking distance to the centre of town seem to be competitive on price that is always worth a check these cabins clean comfortable

Came for 2 days and stayed for 7 😊 sites level and vans spread out. So quiet you can hear the waves Amenities clean and staff friendly.Thanks to Rob the marriage saver for help in parking.
Beautiful views
